title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping playbook that achieved $1M ARR in 117 days and grew to $10M ARR without external funding. The episode covers strategies including PLG, SEO and AEO, warm outbound, churn reduction, and pricing experimentation.
